name: "[Bug] Defect report"
about: Something is broken. Use the Contribution Traceability loop to attribute the report to its source.
title: "[Bug] "
labels: ["type:code", "traceability:bug"]
assignees: []
---

- **Channel**: <!-- Telegram | Discord | Twitter | Call | Conversation | RSS | Direct -->
- **Contributor**: <!-- @handle (0x-address if known) -->
- **Date**: <!-- YYYY-MM-DD -->
- **Original**: <!-- link, quoted text, or "private — see off-repo archive" -->

## What's broken

<!-- Concrete description. Include contract / file / commit SHA where observed. -->

## Repro

<!-- Minimal steps or test case. `forge test --match-path ...` preferred. -->

## Expected vs. actual

<!--
Expected: ...
Actual: ...
-->

## Resolution Hooks

- [ ] Fix commit (SHA)
- [ ] Regression test added
- [ ] ContributionDAG attribution-ID
- [ ] Closing comment posted
